headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Nears Earnings With Its Valuation Case Still Up For Debate
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) heads into its July 29 earnings release with the market focused on whether expected year-over-year gains in earnings and revenue materialize for the June 2026 quarter. See our latest analysis for C.H. Robinson Worldwide. At a share price of $205.51, C.H. Robinson Worldwide has moved sharply higher in recent months, with a 30 day share price return of 14.91% and a year to date share price return of 25.53%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 102.35% reflects...
